mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL((MAX(TO_NUMBER(CONT_SEQ))+1),1)AS CONT_SEQ FROM NMCP_CONT_RATE_ADDITION
INSERT INTO NMCP_CONT_RATE_ADDITION ( CONT_KIND, CD_GROUP_ID1, CD_GROUP_ID2, USE_YN, CONT_TITLE, CONT_TEXT, CONT_CONTENT, PAY, PAYVAT, PAY_YN, CRET_ID, CRET_DT, CONT_SEQ, SOC_CODE, CONT_IMG, CONT_MOBILE_CONTENT ) VALUES ( #{contKind} , #{cdGroupId1} , #{cdGroupId2} , #{useYn} , #{contTitle} , #{contText} , #{contContent} , #{pay} , #{payvat} , #{payYn} , #{cretId} , SYSDATE , #{contSeq}, #{socCode}, #{contImg}, #{contMobileContent} )
mapper.select: SELECT NATION_RATE_KEY, NATION_NAME_EN, NATION_NAME_KR, RATE_SECOND, RATE_MINUTE, NATION_CODE, SDATE FROM MCP_NATION_RATE ORDER BY NATION_NAME_KR
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NMCP_WIRE_PROD_CONT ( WIRE_PROD_CD, WIRE_PROD_TITLE, WIRE_PROD_PC_SBST, WIRE_PROD_MOBILE_SBST, WIRE_PROD_REG_ID, WIRE_PROD_REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{wireProdCd}, #{wireProdTitle}, #{wireProdPcSbst}, #{wireProdMobileSbst}, #{wireProdRegId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE NMCP_WIRE_PROD_CONT SET WIRE_PROD_TITLE = #{wireProdTitle}, WIRE_PROD_PC_SBST = #{wireProdPcSbst}, WIRE_PROD_MOBILE_SBST = #{wireProdMobileSbst}, WIRE_PROD_REG_ID = #{wireProdRegId}, WIRE_PROD_REG_DT = SYSDATE WHERE WIRE_PROD_CD = #{wireProdCd}
mapper.select: SELECT WIRE_PROD_CD, WIRE_PROD_TITLE, WIRE_PROD_PC_SBST, WIRE_PROD_MOBILE_SBST, WIRE_PROD_REG_ID, WIRE_PROD_REG_DT FROM NMCP_WIRE_PROD_CONT WHERE WIRE_PROD_CD = #{wireProdCd}
SELECT WIRE_PROD_CD, WIRE_PROD_TITLE, WIRE_PROD_REG_ID, WIRE_PROD_REG_DT FROM NMCP_WIRE_PROD_CONT ORDER BY WIRE_PROD_REG_DT DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL((MAX(TO_NUMBER(WIRE_PROD_DTL_SEQ))+1),1)AS WIRE_PROD_DTL_SEQ FROM NMCP_WIRE_PROD_DTL
INSERT INTO NMCP_WIRE_PROD_DTL ( WIRE_PROD_DTL_SEQ, WIRE_PROD_CD, WIRE_PROD_CORP, WIRE_PROD_NAME, WIRE_PROD_STICKER, WIRE_PROD_AMT, WIRE_PROD_AMT_DESC, WIRE_PROD_AMT_TEXT, WIRE_PROD_AMT_TYPE, WIRE_PROD_SHOW_YN, WIRE_PROD_RECOM_YN, WIRE_PROD_IMG, WIRE_PROD_IMG_DESC, WIRE_PROD_TEXT, WIRE_PROD_PC_SBST, WIRE_PROD_MOBILE_SBST, WIRE_PROD_REG_ID, WIRE_PROD_REG_DT, WIRE_PROD_CHANNEL, WIRE_PROD_SPEED, WIRE_PROD_FREEBIES ) VALUES ( #{wireProdDtlSeq}, #{wireProdCd}, #{wireProdCorp}, #{wireProdName}, #{wireProdSticker}, #{wireProdAmt}, #{wireProdAmtDesc}, #{wireProdAmtText}, #{wireProdAmtType}, #{wireProdShowYn}, #{wireProdRecomYn}, #{wireProdImg}, #{wireProdImgDesc}, #{wireProdText}, #{wireProdPcSbst}, #{wireProdMobileSbst}, #{wireProdRegId}, SYSDATE, #{wireProdChannel}, #{wireProdSpeed}, #{wireProdFreebies} )
mapper.select: SELECT WIRE_PROD_DTL_SEQ, WIRE_PROD_CD, WIRE_PROD_CORP, WIRE_PROD_NAME, WIRE_PROD_STICKER, WIRE_PROD_AMT, WIRE_PROD_AMT_DESC, WIRE_PROD_AMT_TEXT, WIRE_PROD_AMT_TYPE, WIRE_PROD_SHOW_YN, WIRE_PROD_RECOM_YN, WIRE_PROD_IMG, WIRE_PROD_IMG_DESC, WIRE_PROD_TEXT, WIRE_PROD_PC_SBST, WIRE_PROD_MOBILE_SBST, WIRE_PROD_REG_ID, WIRE_PROD_REG_DT, WIRE_PROD_CHANNEL, WIRE_PROD_SPEED, WIRE_PROD_FREEBIES FROM NMCP_WIRE_PROD_DTL WHERE WIRE_PROD_DTL_SEQ = #{wireProdDtlSeq}

SELECT A.WIRE_PROD_DTL_SEQ, A.WIRE_PROD_CD, A.WIRE_PROD_NAME, A.WIRE_PROD_SHOW_YN, A.WIRE_PROD_REG_ID, A.WIRE_PROD_REG_DT FROM NMCP_WIRE_PROD_DTL A, NMCP_CD_DTL B WHERE 1=1 AND B.CD_GROUP_ID = 'WIREPRODCORP' AND B.DTL_CD = A.WIRE_PROD_CORP AND B.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND A.WIRE_PROD_CD = #{wireProdCd}
AND UPPER(A.WIRE_PROD_NAME) LIKE '%'|| UPPER(#{wireProdName}) ||'%'
ORDER BY A.WIRE_PROD_REG_DT DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NMCP_WIRE_PROD_DTL A, NMCP_CD_DTL B WHERE 1=1 AND B.CD_GROUP_ID = 'WIREPRODCORP' AND B.DTL_CD = A.WIRE_PROD_CORP AND B.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND A.WIRE_PROD_CD = #{wireProdCd}
AND UPPER(A.WIRE_PROD_NAME) LIKE '%'|| UPPER(#{wireProdName}) ||'%'
ORDER BY A.WIRE_PROD_REG_DT DESC

SELECT /*ContMapper.getWireCounselList 유선상담관리 리스트 */ COUNSEL_SEQ , T1.WIRE_PROD_DTL_SEQ , COUNSEL_NM , COUNSEL_CTN , COUNSEL_MEMO , COUNSEL_REG_DT , COUNSEL_STATUS , RVISN_DT , DONE_DT , PRO_STATUS , WIRE_PROD_CD --구분코드 중분류.. , WIRE_PROD_CORP -- 사업자. , WIRE_PROD_NAME -- 소분류 제품명 FROM NMCP_WIRE_COUNSEL T1, NMCP_WIRE_PROD_DTL T2 WHERE 1=1 AND T1.WIRE_PROD_DTL_SEQ = T2.WIRE_PROD_DTL_SEQ(+) AND T1.COUNSEL_SEQ = #{counselSeq}
mapper.update:
UPDATE NMCP_WIRE_COUNSEL SET RVISN_DT = SYSDATE , COUNSEL_STATUS = #{counselStatus} --신청상태(I:진행중, C:고객취소, D:관리자삭제, S:신청완료 , PRO_STATUS = #{proStatus} --진행상태
, DONE_DT = SYSDATE --완료일시
, DONE_DT = NULL
WHERE COUNSEL_SEQ = #{counselSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT /*ContMapper.getCounselHistory 유선상담관리 리스트 */ COUNSEL_SEQ --상담번호 , HISTORY_IDX --상담일련번호 , ADMIN_ID --등록자아이디 , COUNSEL_MEMO --상담 내용 , REG_DT --등록일 FROM NMCP_WIRE_COUNSEL_HISTORY WHERE 1=1 AND COUNSEL_SEQ = #{counselSeq} ORDER BY REG_DT DESC
